name: artquest
description: Gamified app for learning drawing and animation
author: ArtQuest

scripts.predev: node scripts/generate-sfx-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-ambient-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-portrait-assets.mjs
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/generate-sfx-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-ambient-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-portrait-assets.mjs
scripts.preelectron:dev: node scripts/generate-sfx-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-ambient-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-portrait-assets.mjs
scripts.generate:assets: node scripts/generate-sfx-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-ambient-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-portrait-assets.mjs
scripts.electron:build: node scripts/generate-sfx-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-ambient-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-portrait-assets.mjs && node scripts/copy-fundamentals-book-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-windows-icon.mjs && electron-vite build && node scripts/inline-preload-chunk.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:release: node scripts/generate-sfx-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-ambient-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-portrait-assets.mjs && node scripts/copy-fundamentals-book-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-windows-icon.mjs && electron-vite build && node scripts/inline-preload-chunk.mjs && electron-builder --config.directories.output=dist-release
scripts.electron:build:portable: node scripts/generate-sfx-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-ambient-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-portrait-assets.mjs && node scripts/copy-fundamentals-book-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-windows-icon.mjs && electron-vite build && node scripts/inline-preload-chunk.mjs && electron-builder --win nsis zip portable
scripts.check: npm run lint && tsc --noEmit && npm test && npm run validate:quests && npm run i18n:check
scripts.test:e2e:electron: node scripts/generate-sfx-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-ambient-wav.mjs && node scripts/generate-portrait-assets.mjs && electron-vite build && node scripts/inline-preload-chunk.mjs && playwright test -c playwright.electron.config.ts
